data.title: Da Yuzhou Shidai
data.synopsis:
Earth is facing annihilation due to the appearance of neutron star debris. Led by Yao Yuan, the Black Star Squad takes on the mission of saving humanity's future. Using the spaceship Hope, they evacuate a large number of people from Earth to search for a new home in space. During their adventures and battles, Yao Yuan and his team learn of the existence of more advanced cosmic civilizations and also realize the terrifying truth: the universe is not a paradise, but an unknown realm filled with darkness, danger, death, and terror.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of zhttty's web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Kamonohashi Ron no Kindan Suiri 2nd Season
鴨乃橋ロンの禁断推理 2nd Season

data.title: Kamonohashi Ron no Kindan Suiri 2nd Season
data.title_japanese: 鴨乃橋ロンの禁断推理 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
Not long after forming their partnership, detectives Ron Kamonohashi and Totomaru Isshiki have proven adept at solving various cases together. However, the two are further motivated to continue their work when they discover that the House of M—an infamous crime syndicate—orchestrated Ron's expulsion from the prestigious Detective Training Academy BLUE five years prior. It appears that this group is also linked to Ron's mysterious ability that causes those around him to lose their lives, a phenomenon which Ron is desperate to stop.

A member of the House of M soon starts to commit boastful serial murders around Shibuya as an act of provocation toward Ron. Consequently, the investigative pair must do their best to apprehend the culprit for the sake of justice as well as learning more about Ron's dark past and present condition.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Heroic Exploration Tale Starting from Mob
The Story of an Exploration Hero Who Has Worked His Way Up from Common People
モブから始まる探索英雄譚
A Nobody's Way Up to an Exploration Hero

data.title: Mob kara Hajimaru Tansaku Eiyuutan
data.title_english: A Nobody's Way Up to an Exploration Hero
data.title_japanese: モブから始まる探索英雄譚
title_synonyms: Heroic Exploration Tale Starting from Mob
The Story of an Exploration Hero Who Has Worked His Way Up from Common People
data.synopsis:
Meet Kaito Takagi, your typical high schooler with a low profile. He spends his days exploring dungeons in Japan, hunting slimes for some extra cash. On the side, he quietly admires his childhood friend, the popular girl in class. One day, a rare golden slime shows up, and after Kaito defeats it, he finds a super valuable item—a card that can summon mythical beings! He decides to use it and summons a stunning warrior maiden. Now, Kaito has a chance to rise above his ordinary explorer life. Get ready for a modern fantasy story filled with battles!

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - Shin Jidai no Tobira
ウマ娘 プリティーダービー 新時代の扉
Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Beginning of a New Era

data.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - Shin Jidai no Tobira
data.title_english: Umamusume: Pretty Derby - Beginning of a New Era
data.title_japanese: ウマ娘 プリティーダービー 新時代の扉
data.synopsis:
Running in the highest level of horse racing, the Twinkle Series, is the dream of many horse girls. Although she has only taken part in freestyle racing before, horse girl Jungle Pocket discovers that very same aspiration after she witnesses Fuji Kiseki's tremendous victory on a grand stage. Equipped with unwavering self-confidence, Jungle Pocket is quickly able to accumulate a few victories, allowing her to participate in higher-level races.

When Jungle Pocket takes part in her first G1 race alongside another rising racer—the highly intelligent and eccentric Agnes Tachyon—she realizes the enormous gap in their abilities. However, that only motivates Jungle Pocket even further as she resolves to get her revenge against Tachyon by winning the honored Triple Crown Classic title the following year. Although the world of horse racing is never predictable or easy, Jungle Pocket is determined to take down Tachyon and herald the beginning of a new era.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: 日本へようこそエルフさん。

data.title: Nihon e Youkoso Elf-san.
data.title_japanese: 日本へようこそエルフさん。
data.synopsis:
Since childhood, Kazuhiro Kitase has been able to dream of a different world. He can return to reality by falling asleep or dying, and he can pick up where he left off by sleeping again. For years, he has had many adventures alongside Mariabelle, a beautiful elf who works for the Sorcery Guild.

On one of their escapades, they come across the lair of a dragon taking care of its eggs. They inadvertently wake the slumbering beast, who promptly reduces them to ashes. For Kazuhiro, it is merely a temporary setback, as he can simply go back. However, he is shocked to find Mariabelle herself safe and sound asleep next to him.

Kazuhiro realizes that his dream world is an alternate reality altogether. In the meantime, he makes the most of this bizarre circumstance, introducing Mariabelle to the sights and wonders of Japan. Now, with their time together spanning two worlds, their real adventures have just begun!

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Nihon e Youkoso Elf-san. was released on Blu-ray as a complete box set on June 11, 2025.

data.title: Yiren Jun Moxie
data.synopsis:
Jun Xie, a legendary ace agent feared by all, suffered an accident during a mission and was reborn in the Xuanxuan Continent as Jun Moxie, the infamous and utterly useless young master of the Tianxiang Kingdom. His family is now mired in trouble and facing numerous crises. Though his body is now a useless shell, he remains a king in this life, and will continue to do so in this new world! He will roam the martial world, wielding his sword, caring not who reigns supreme; for him, a late-night snack is nothing more than a pot of turtle soup.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Feng Ling Tian Xia's (风凌天下) web novel, Yi Shi Xie Jun (异世邪君).

data.title: Xian Yu Ge 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
The carefree Brother Xianyu is still enjoying an ordinary and happy daily life on Yushen Island. The gods from the Nantianmen Group broke the original peace of the island in order to investigate the stolen divine tablets. As unexpected events happened one after another, the mysteries surrounding the "Fish God" and "Seren" slowly unfolded due to Brother Xianyu's unexpected involvement. Faced with racial differences and worldly prejudices, how will Brother Xianyu use his unique way of doing things to pass this test...

(Source: Bilibili, translated)

titles.title: 呪術廻戦 「死滅回游 前編」
Jujutsu Kaisen: The Culling Game Part 1

data.title: Jujutsu Kaisen: Shimetsu Kaiyuu - Zenpen
data.title_english: Jujutsu Kaisen: The Culling Game Part 1
data.title_japanese: 呪術廻戦 「死滅回游 前編」
data.synopsis:
Kenjaku, the one known as Noritoshi Kamo and most recently as Suguru Getou, has initiated the next step in his destructive, thousand-year plan of ordinary humans' evolution and eventual eradication. The jujutsu world higher-ups reinstate 15-year-old Yuuji Itadori's execution, as Satoru Gojou is incapacitated as a result of Kenjaku's master plan in Shibuya. While Yuuji is unaware of this, he patrols the abandoned Tokyo streets with Chousou, exterminating any and all cursed spirits in his way.

Meanwhile, the bigoted and arrogant Naoya Zenin's pride takes a hit when Megumi Fushiguro is selected as the Zenin Clan's next head. To draw out Megumi and eliminate him, he goes after Yuuji—but Yuuta Okkotsu is set on being Yuuji's executioner. Kenjaku's "Culling Game"—a rigorous battle royale spanning throughout Japan and forcing the jujutsu competitors to kill each other—is set in motion, and the young jujutsu sorcerers join the fray to settle old scores, free Gojou, and liberate the jujutsu world from the threat that is Kenjaku.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
